venue: New York New Jersey Stadium, East Rutherford (neutral)
confirmed_lineup_note: Argentina: E.Martinez; Montiel, Romero, L.Martinez, Tagliafico; De Paul, E.Fernandez, Mac Allister, N.Gonzalez; Messi, J.Alvarez. Spain: U.Simon; Porro, Cubarsi, Laporte, Cucurella; Rodri, F.Ruiz; Yamal, Olmo, Baena; Oyarzabal.
note_on_odds: Sized against the 3.70 quote; price drifted to 3.80 before placement (further in the model's favor). Placed at 3.80, stake unchanged — same precedent as bet #11.

bets.staking_method: half-Kelly capped at 8% of settled bankroll, rounded up to whole euro: full-Kelly fraction 0.1367, half-Kelly 0.0683 (under 0.08 cap). 0.0683 x EUR211.04 = EUR14.42 -> EUR15.00. Sized pre-drift at 3.70; placed at 3.80, stake unchanged.

excluded_legs_note: Draw EV -10.5% and Spain win EV -21.6% — both negative, no bet. Only the Argentina leg clears the +3% EV threshold.
